CVE-2024-56732.title: HarfBuzz is a text shaping engine. Starting with 8.5.0 through 10 ...
CVE-2024-56732.summary: HarfBuzz is a text shaping engine. Starting with 8.5.0 through 10.0.1, there is a heap-based buffer overflow in the hb_cairo_glyphs_from_buffer function.
